rows.CNzh:

怎么可能交给你这种怪物！

<unk[3:0:7]>居然在如此險惡的世道下來找我搭話……
肯定是怪物之類的吧？

<Color=red>強化裝備的祝福<Color=white>！

<unk[3:0:7]>Anyone calling upon me<unk[5:0]> from out there
in all that ugliness...<unk[5:0]> You must be a

enhancement<Color=white> to one of you.

<unk[3:0:10]>难得我来到驿站的附近，<unk[5:0]>

我的灵魂也会受到鼓舞，
或许就会有<Color=red>出去的勇气<Color=white>了……

本來是想為旅行者們授予<Color=red>祝福<Color=white>的……
如果能夠聽到樂團那<Color=red>太鼓的聲音<Color=white>，

或許能激勵我的靈魂，
讓我湧現<Color=red>出去外面的勇氣<Color=white>也說不定……

<unk[3:0:10]>せっかく<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿の<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くに<Ruby={2:2}み>身を<Ruby={2:4}うつ>移し<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:10]>I moved near the stable here so I could
give my <Color=red>blessings<Color=white> to travelers.

I suppose that if I heard something truly
rousing, like the <Color=red>sound of a drum<Color=white>...

I might feel <Color=red>inspired to come outside<Color=white>.<unk[5:0]>
But only maybe.
